caption: A cartoon boy with brown hair and a surprised expression, wearing an orange patterned sweater, stands on a cobblestone street at dusk between old-fashioned buildings under an orange sky with silhouetted bats. The scene transforms into an animated illustration depicts an empty cobblestone street at dusk lined with old-fashioned shops, including one with an "APOTNECARY" sign, illuminated by glowing streetlamps and warm window lights under an orange sky with three bat silhouettes.

A wide-eyed cartoon character wearing a pointed tinfoil hat, a tactical vest, and crinkled silver boots is in a running pose in a dark, graffiti-covered alleyway illuminated by colorful, glowing vending machines. The scene transforms into a glowing green ring of swirling light hangs suspended in a dark, graffiti-covered alleyway next to a neon-lit vending machine dripping with green slime.
A blonde woman in a black graphic sweater stands in an underground parking garage. The scene transforms into the empty garage with a small glowing green swirl hovering between the cars.
A woman with long braids browses crates of records in a cluttered record store. The scene transforms into the record store without her, a small green glow fading by the far shelves.

A woman wearing sunglasses and a green tracksuit with black panels stands in bright sunlight against a plain, light-colored wall with a textured black strap slung across her chest. The scene transforms into a bright green circular light with a swirling pattern glows in the corner of a room, casting a green light onto the off-white walls and concrete floor.

An illustrated character with messy purple hair, glasses, and headphones around their neck stands outside a gas station at night, looking at a smartphone with a distressed, open-mouthed expression under a green neon glow. The scene transforms into a bright, glowing green oval with swirling patterns is positioned in the foreground of an animated street scene at night, featuring a stop sign and buildings under a dark sky.

A young Black man wearing a beige cap, a brown sweatshirt with a red basketball graphic, and black sweatpants stands next to a BMX bicycle while holding a basketball under his arm in front of a graffiti-covered wall in warm, golden sunlight. The scene transforms into in bright daylight, a man wearing a black long-sleeve shirt and a white cap is positioned with his arms raised inside a large, translucent green sphere above a silver BMX bicycle parked by a metal guardrail.

A blocky character with a round green head and a glowing blue visor stands on a green platform wearing a blue suit, a blue cape with a red underside, and brown shoes against a green patterned background. The scene transforms into a bright green, circular tunnel-like pattern with glowing white highlights is positioned above a dark, patterned border at the bottom of the frame.

A stout, smiling cartoon man wearing a green suit and a small brown hat stands on a leaf-strewn street at night, illuminated by the warm glow of a street lamp overhead with a "CURIOS" shop in the background. The scene transforms into a bright green circular spiral with a dark center is surrounded by glowing patterns and several scattered brown leaves.

A green cartoon frog wearing a brown suit, glasses, and a yellow tie stands on a tiled floor in front of a large blue vending machine under a starry night sky. The scene transforms into a large, glossy green capsule-shaped object stands on a tiled floor, backlit by a bright light against a starry space background filled with suspended cartoon vending machines and small items.

A cartoon girl dressed in a black witch hat and robe smiles while stirring a large cauldron over a fire inside a wooden cabin illuminated by warm candlelight. The scene transforms into in an animated style, a glowing green, swirling oval hovers above a black cauldron heated by fire inside a dimly lit wooden room filled with shelves of jars, lit candles, and an arched doorway showing an orange forest.
